me.desc: Your own thoughts – just for you.

me.subtitle: Your private diary: write, add stickers, read back later.
me.writeHint: Just start writing. You can add stickers afterwards.
me.localOnly: Your diary stays on this device. Others can see it if they use your phone. Don’t write anything too private.
me.noPages: No entries yet. Write your first page above.
me.pickPage: Select a page on the left.

pin.setupBody: You can protect your diary with a PIN so only you can read it.
pin.forgotHint: Ask a trusted adult to help you reset it.
pin.parentNote: Adults can reset the PIN in settings.
